lang_en: Gujarati, Unknown language in Devanāgarī script
lang_he: Gujarati, Unknown language in Devanāgarī script
description: Fragment in an Indian Devanāgarī script, in an as yet unidentified language, possibly a dialect of Gujarati. See Gideon Bohak, "T-S AS 159.248, T-S AS 159.247: an unidentified Indian language," Fragment of the Month (March 2008), and further discussion at http://lughat.blogspot.com/2013/10/a-little-mystery-unidentified-indic.html and https://languagelog.ldc.upenn.edu/nll/?p=7875. Image of recto: https://www.lib.cam.ac.uk/files/ts-as-159-247-big-f.jpg. See also T-S AS 159.248 (PGPID 32113).
description_he: קטע בכתב דוואנאגארי הודי, בשפה שטרם זוהתה, ייתכן שניב של גוג'ראטי
